runtime_loop_candidates.label: mDNS discovery
runtime_loop_candidates.note: All mDNS discovery toggles are off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Clipboard polling
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Clipboard polling is off because MUSU_ENABLE_CLIPBOARD_SYNC is not set.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Cloud heartbeat
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Account login is present, so cloud registration can heartbeat at 300s.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: File sync/watch
runtime_loop_candidates.note: No shared roots are configured, so file watcher/sync stays off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Relay target polling
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Relay target polling is active at 60s with empty backoff capped at 300s.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Autonomous planner
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Planner is off because MUSU_ENABLE_PLANNER is not set.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Health check retry
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Health check retry stays off until update.toml enables a source and `musu auto-update --supervise` is launched.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Auto-update supervisor
runtime_loop_candidates.note: update.toml is absent, so auto-update supervision stays off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Bridge readiness wait
runtime_loop_candidates.note: CLI bridge readiness waits only run during commands like `musu up`/`musu bridge`, using bounded 250-2000ms backoff until the caller timeout expires.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Log/telemetry flush
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Telemetry/log flush primitives are limited to explicit one-shot CLI/reporting surfaces; no background flush worker is expected.

note: cpu_pct_one_core is normalized so one fully busy logical processor is 100.
